mapper.select: SELECT plan_no, plan_name, monthly_price, workspace_limit, member_limit, description, created_dt FROM SAAS_PLAN ORDER BY monthly_price ASC
SELECT plan_no, plan_name, monthly_price, workspace_limit, member_limit, description, created_dt FROM SAAS_PLAN WHERE plan_no = #{planNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO SAAS_PLAN ( plan_name, monthly_price, yearly_price, workspace_limit, member_limit, storage_gb, description, created_dt ) VALUES ( #{planName}, #{monthlyPrice}, #{yearlyPrice}, #{workspaceLimit}, #{memberLimit}, #{storageGb}, #{description}, NOW() )

INSERT INTO SAAS_SUBSCRIPTION ( memberNo, plan_no, status, start_dt, renewal_dt, payment_method, created_dt, updated_dt ) VALUES ( #{memberNo}, #{planNo}, 'PENDING', CURDATE(), DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 MONTH), #{paymentMethod}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT s.subscription_no, s.memberNo, s.plan_no, p.plan_name, s.status, s.start_dt, s.renewal_dt, s.cancelled_dt, s.payment_method, s.created_dt, s.updated_dt FROM SAAS_SUBSCRIPTION s LEFT JOIN SAAS_PLAN p ON s.plan_no = p.plan_no WHERE s.memberNo = #{memberNo} AND s.status IN ('ACTIVE', 'PENDING') ORDER BY s.created_dt DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT s.subscription_no, s.memberNo, s.plan_no, p.plan_name, s.status, s.start_dt, s.renewal_dt, s.cancelled_dt, s.payment_method, s.created_dt, s.updated_dt FROM SAAS_SUBSCRIPTION s LEFT JOIN SAAS_PLAN p ON s.plan_no = p.plan_no WHERE s.subscription_no = #{subscriptionNo}

SELECT s.subscription_no, s.memberNo, s.plan_no, p.plan_name, s.status, s.start_dt, s.renewal_dt, s.cancelled_dt, s.payment_method, s.created_dt, s.updated_dt FROM SAAS_SUBSCRIPTION s LEFT JOIN SAAS_PLAN p ON s.plan_no = p.plan_no WHERE s.memberNo = #{memberNo} ORDER BY s.created_dt DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE SAAS_SUBSCRIPTION SET status = #{status}, updated_dt = NOW() WHERE subscription_no = #{subscriptionNo}
UPDATE SAAS_SUBSCRIPTION SET renewal_dt = DATE_ADD(renewal_dt, INTERVAL 1 MONTH), updated_dt = NOW() WHERE subscription_no = #{subscriptionNo}
UPDATE SAAS_SUBSCRIPTION SET status = 'CANCELLED', cancelled_dt = CURDATE(), updated_dt = NOW() WHERE subscription_no = #{subscriptionNo}
UPDATE SAAS_SUBSCRIPTION SET plan_no = #{newPlanNo}, updated_dt = NOW() WHERE subscription_no = #{subscriptionNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO SAAS_PAYMENT_HISTORY ( subscription_no, amount, status, payment_method, payment_key, order_id, created_dt ) VALUES ( #{subscriptionNo}, #{amount}, #{status}, #{paymentMethod}, #{paymentKey}, #{orderId}, NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT payment_no, subscription_no, amount, status, payment_method, payment_key, order_id, failure_reason, paid_dt, created_dt FROM SAAS_PAYMENT_HISTORY WHERE subscription_no = #{subscriptionNo} ORDER BY created_dt DESC
SELECT payment_no, subscription_no, amount, status, payment_method, payment_key, order_id, failure_reason, paid_dt, created_dt FROM SAAS_PAYMENT_HISTORY WHERE payment_no = #{paymentNo}
mapper.update: UPDATE SAAS_PAYMENT_HISTORY SET status = #{status}, payment_key = #{paymentKey}, paid_dt = NOW() WHERE payment_no = #{paymentNo}
mapper.select: SELECT ph.payment_no, ph.subscription_no, ph.amount, ph.status, ph.payment_method, ph.payment_key, ph.order_id, ph.failure_reason, ph.paid_dt, ph.created_dt FROM SAAS_PAYMENT_HISTORY ph INNER JOIN SAAS_SUBSCRIPTION s ON ph.subscription_no = s.subscription_no WHERE s.memberNo = #{memberNo} ORDER BY ph.created_dt DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO SAAS_INVOICE ( subscription_no, memberNo, amount, status, issued_dt, due_dt, description, created_dt ) VALUES ( #{subscriptionNo}, #{memberNo}, #{amount}, 'PENDING', CURDATE(), DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 7 DAY), #{description}, NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT invoice_no, subscription_no, memberNo, amount, status, issued_dt, due_dt, paid_dt, description, created_dt FROM SAAS_INVOICE WHERE memberNo = #{memberNo} ORDER BY issued_dt DESC
SELECT invoice_no, subscription_no, memberNo, amount, status, issued_dt, due_dt, paid_dt, description, created_dt FROM SAAS_INVOICE WHERE subscription_no = #{subscriptionNo} ORDER BY issued_dt DESC
SELECT invoice_no, subscription_no, memberNo, amount, status, issued_dt, due_dt, paid_dt, description, created_dt FROM SAAS_INVOICE WHERE invoice_no = #{invoiceNo}
mapper.update: UPDATE SAAS_INVOICE SET status = #{status}, paid_dt = NOW()NULL WHERE invoice_no = #{invoiceNo}
mapper.select: SELECT invoice_no, subscription_no, memberNo, amount, status, issued_dt, due_dt, paid_dt, description, created_dt FROM SAAS_INVOICE WHERE status = 'PENDING' AND due_dt < CURDATE() ORDER BY due_dt ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM SAAS_WORKSPACE_MEMBER WHERE workSpaceNo = #{workSpaceNo} AND deletedDt IS NULL
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM SAAS_WORKSPACE_MEMBER WHERE memberNo = #{memberNo} AND deletedDt IS NULL

SELECT p.member_limit AS memberLimit, p.workspace_limit AS workspaceLimit FROM SAAS_SUBSCRIPTION s JOIN SAAS_PLAN p ON s.plan_no = p.plan_no WHERE s.memberNo = #{memberNo} AND s.status = 'ACTIVE' LIMIT 1
